title: Writing a Recursive Function to Flatten a Nested List
scenario: Write a function in Python that flattens a nested list using recursion. The function should be named 'flatten_list' and should take a nested list as input. The output should be a flat list of elements.
constraints: Must be under 30 lines of code
Must use recursion to flatten the list

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code is syntactically correct and uses Python syntax.
Check if the code meets the constraints specified in the scenario.
Check if the code uses recursion to flatten the list.
Check if the code flattens the nested list correctly.
